metaTitle.en: About Us - PeeKeeper Escape-Proof Dog Diapers

metaDescription.en: Learn the PeeKeeper story — how a senior dog named Dash inspired the world's first escape-proof dog diaper.

heading.en: A diaper made by a dog mom, for dog moms.

content.en: The PeeKeeper story starts with a senior dog named Dash and a simple frustration.

When Lisa adopted Dash, a senior dog with incontinence issues, she quickly discovered that existing diaper products just didn't work. They slipped off, leaked, and left both Dash and Lisa frustrated.

Determined to find a solution, Lisa designed a harness-style diaper that wraps securely around the waist and tail. The design was different from anything on the market — and it worked.

What started as a single product listed on eBay quickly grew into a brand trusted by thousands of pet parents. Today, PeeKeeper offers escape-proof diapers in multiple sizes and colors, with the same commitment to quality and compassion that inspired the original design.

description.en: Every product starts with the question: 'Will this make a dog's life better?' Comfort, fit, and freedom are non-negotiable.
Our washable diapers reduce waste compared to disposables. We believe better pet care shouldn't cost the earth.
We're pet parents too. We understand the struggle, the love, and the need for products that truly work. Our customers are our family.

title.en: Ready to try the diaper that started it all?
